 */import api from'./api';import{mockItems,mockCategories,mockLocations}from'./mockData';const DELAY=400;const delay=ms=>new Promise(res=>setTimeout(res,ms));// ── In-memory store (mirrors mockData, mutated by create/update/delete) ──────

export async function getItems(){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.get('/items/');return r.data;},()=>[..._items]);}export async function getItemById(id){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.get("/items/".concat(id));return r.data;},()=>{var _items$find;return(_items$find=_items.find(i=>i.id===Number(id)))!==null&&_items$find!==void 0?_items$find:null;});}export async function createItem(payload){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.post('/items/',payload);return r.data;},()=>{const newItem=_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},payload),{},{id:Math.max(..._items.map(i=>i.id))+1});_items.push(newItem);return newItem;});}export async function updateItem(id,payload){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.put("/items/".concat(id),payload);return r.data;},()=>{const idx=_items.findIndex(i=>i.id===Number(id));if(idx===-1)throw new Error('Not found');_items[idx]=_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},_items[idx]),payload);return _items[idx];});}export async function deleteItem(id){return tryReal(async()=>{await api.delete("/items/".concat(id));return true;},()=>{_items=_items.filter(i=>i.id!==Number(id));return true;});}export async function getLowStockItems(){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.get('/items/low-stock');return r.data;},()=>_items.filter(i=>i.stock_count<10));}// ── Categories ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function getCategories(){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.get('/categories/');return r.data;},()=>[..._categories]);}export async function createCategory(payload){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.post('/categories/',payload);return r.data;},()=>{const newCat=_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},payload),{},{id:Math.max(..._categories.map(c=>c.id))+1});_categories.push(newCat);return newCat;});}// ── Locations (mock-only) ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function getLocations(){await delay(DELAY);return[..._locations];}export async function createLocation(payload){await delay(DELAY);const newLoc=_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},payload),{},{id:Math.max(..._locations.map(l=>l.id))+1,used:0});_locations.push(newLoc);return newLoc;}export async function updateLocation(id,payload){await delay(DELAY);const idx=_locations.findIndex(l=>l.id===Number(id));if(idx===-1)throw new Error('Not found');_locations[idx]=_objectSpread(_objectSpread({},_locations[idx]),payload);return _locations[idx];}export async function deleteLocation(id){await delay(DELAY);_locations=_locations.filter(l=>l.id!==Number(id));return true;}// ── Dashboard stats ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function getDashboardStats(){await delay(DELAY);const items=[..._items];return{totalItems:items.length,totalQuantity:items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.stock_count,0),lowStockCount:items.filter(i=>i.stock_count<10).length,totalLocations:_locations.length,totalValue:items.reduce((s,i)=>s+i.stock_count*i.price,0),recentItems:[...items].sort((a,b)=>b.id-a.id).slice(0,5),lowStockItems:items.filter(i=>i.stock_count<10).slice(0,5)};}// ── Auth ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
export async function login(username,password){return tryReal(async()=>{const r=await api.post('/users/login',{username,password});return r.data;},()=>{var _mockUsers$find;// Demo fallback: any username + "password123"
if(password!=='password123')throw new Error('Invalid credentials');const mockUsers=[{id:1,username:'admin',role:'admin'},{id:2,username:'manager',role:'manager'},{id:3,username:'staff',role:'staff'}];const user=(_mockUsers$find=mockUsers.find(u=>u.username===username))!==null&&_mockUsers$find!==void 0?_mockUsers$find:mockUsers[0];return{user,access_token:'mock-token',token_type:'bearer'};});}
